summary: Verified deletion of two blocks on ProjectDetailPage. On /projects/rv32im-soc-processor: 'Cycle-accurate simulation is captured via GTKWave' text, 'Add simulation.png' placeholder, 'WAVEFORM RESULTS' collapsible section (data-testid=toggle-waveforms), and 'Drop waveform.png' placeholder are all gone. Section 04 SIMULATION RESULTS renders with only Functional Verification Waveforms subsection (data-testid=functional-verification-waveforms) containing all 10 accordions (cpu, sram, apb-bus, gpio, timer, uart, spi, plic, memory-decoder, complete-soc), all collapsed. Section IDs continuous 01-10. On /projects/rv32im-core (no verification viewer): Section 04 is completely omitted; ordering is 01,02,03,05,06,07,08,09,10 as expected. TopNav has Home/About/Projects/Contact/Request Access/Portal, no Resume regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProjectDetailPage renders 10 sections for SoC (Simulation Results only contains VerificationWaveforms viewer with 10 accordions) and skips section 04 for non-SoC projects. All removals confirmed.
